name: Tables
description: Editable table for managing simple items that don't warrant their own details page, with inline editing and validation.

anatomy.name: Table Container
anatomy.description: Outer wrapper with white background, 1px border #cbd1db, 16px corner radius

anatomy.name: Header Column
anatomy.description: Individual column header with 12px SemiBold #64748b label

anatomy.name: Data Row
anatomy.description: Horizontal row of cells with action column

anatomy.name: Read-only Cell
anatomy.description: Plain text cell, 14px Regular #0f1114, placeholder at 30% opacity

anatomy.name: Editable Cell
anatomy.description: Inline input field, 28px height, 8px corner radius, 1px border (#cbd1db default, #006bd8 focused)

anatomy.name: Edit Button
anatomy.description: 28x28 icon button, 8px corner radius, white fill, #e3e8ed border; disabled: transparent fill, #cbd1db border, #a6b0be icon

anatomy.name: Delete Button
anatomy.description: 28x28 icon button, 8px corner radius, white fill, #e3e8ed border; disabled: transparent fill, #cbd1db border, #a6b0be icon

anatomy.name: Save Button
anatomy.description: 28x28 icon button, 8px corner radius, #008060 active, #e3e8ed fill with #8390a2 icon when disabled

anatomy.name: Error Message
anatomy.description: 12px Regular red text below the cell

variants.bordered: Table sits inside another container like a card or settings panel. 1px #cbd1db border, no shadow.
variants.standalone: Table is the card itself, the top-level surface. No border, shadow 2px 2px 24px rgba(22,52,98,0.08), white header background.
variants.batchEdit: Always-on editing: all rows render inline inputs at once. Use when the page already has a save/discard mechanism.
variants.entityMode: Entity table for complex items that open into a detail page or modal (workflows, integrations). Value tables are for simple items without their own detail page.

guidance.stickyHeader: When the table has many rows, keep the header sticky so column context is visible during scroll.
